name: attest
description: PR contract attestations for coding agents, from directories down to functions.

interface.longDescription: Attest helps coding agents review directory and inline contracts, produce evidence-backed PR signoffs, and block stale attestations before code leaves the machine.
defaultPrompt: Use Attest to check PR contract signoffs.
Create an Attest review worksheet for this PR.
Explain the inline Attest contracts in this file.
